instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall allow shifting only when vehicle speed exceeds minimum threshold.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall enable shifting when Vehicle_Speed exceeds Min_Shift_Speed.

expected_output: IF Vehicle_Speed > Min_Shift_Speed THEN Shift_Enable = TRUE
IF Vehicle_Speed <= Min_Shift_Speed THEN Shift_Enable = FALSE
IF Vehicle_Speed <= Min_Shift_Speed AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Vehicle_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Shift_Enable = FALSE
